name: /audit-pack: --dry-run prints planned bundle composition but writes no audit-pack.md to disk (§2.14)
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"bomFormat":"CycloneDX","specVersion":"1.6","components":[]}' > compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --aibom-file "$PWD/compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --dry-run && ! test -f audit-pack.md && echo ok 1>&2
